══ ROUND 1 ══
--- Sea Elf — Unarmored Caster --- HP: 67/67 | AC: 15
REASONING: ROUND 1: 1 enemies. Opening with Hypnotic Pattern.
ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 16 WIS save. 30ft cube.
→ Young Red Dragon: WIS save [d20:18+4=22 vs DC 16] SUCCESS. Resists.
→ No targets affected. Spell wasted.
--- Young Red Dragon --- HP: 178/178 | AC: 18
REASONING: Multiattack on Sea Elf — Unarmored Caster (3 attacks).
ACTION: Multiattack (3× Bite) on Sea Elf — Unarmored Caster
→ Bite: [d20:15+10=25 vs AC 15] HIT! 18 damage. Sea Elf — Unarmored Caster HP: 49/67
→ Bite: [d20:3+10=13 vs AC 15] MISS.
→ Bite: [d20:19+10=29 vs AC 15] HIT! 13 damage. Sea Elf — Unarmored Caster HP: 36/67
══ ROUND 2 ══
--- Sea Elf — Unarmored Caster --- HP: 36/67 | AC: 15
REASONING: No concentration. Hold Person on Young Red Dragon (paralyzed = auto-crit in melee).
ACTION: Cast Hold Person (Level 2 slot, 2 remaining). DC 16 WIS save on Young Red Dragon.
→ Young Red Dragon: WIS save [d20:16+4=20 vs DC 16] SUCCESS. No effect.
--- Young Red Dragon --- HP: 178/178 | AC: 18
REASONING: Multiattack on Sea Elf — Unarmored Caster (3 attacks).
ACTION: Multiattack (3× Bite) on Sea Elf — Unarmored Caster
→ Bite: [d20:1+10=11 vs AC 15] MISS.
→ Bite: [d20:10+10=20 vs AC 15] HIT! 26 damage. Sea Elf — Unarmored Caster HP: 10/67
→ Bite: [d20:7+10=17 vs AC 15] HIT! 16 damage. Sea Elf — Unarmored Caster HP: -6/67
